markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, process changes, and SOW deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** New content will split 3 BES / 2 Forensics per week. Forensics content will use a new "agentic pipeline" with advanced fact-checking (e.g., EXA) to ensure accuracy for sensitive topics like toxicology.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Blog Pruning:** \~90 of \~200 existing BES articles will be removed or rewritten. GrowthX will first categorize the audit findings (e.g., "Kill," "Refresh") to simplify Rimkus's final review.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**SOW Deliverables:** GrowthX confirmed all SOW deliverables are complete or in progress, with the technical SEO audit now scheduled for a 2-week turnaround.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Internal Content Review:** GrowthX will provide free SEO/AO reviews for Rimkus's internal content. The first few reviews will be live coaching calls to train the Rimkus team on best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Process

  - [**Leadership Change:** Alishia Natiello now leads content review.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX → Alishia (1st pass) → Nora (BES, as needed) → Alishia (CMS publish).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [**Forensics Content:** Jen Bulmash now leads forensics content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [**Goal:** Increase awareness in specific regional hubs, a different approach from the BES strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Production:** A new "agentic pipeline" in the Atlas platform will be used for forensics content.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
          - [**Why:** To ensure accuracy for sensitive topics (e.g., toxicology) by using advanced fact-checkers (e.g., EXA) and a multi-round review process.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Cadence:** New content will be split 3 BES / 2 Forensics per week.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### Blog Pruning & Refresh

  - [**Audit Findings:** GrowthX completed a manual audit of \~200 existing BES articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [**Recommendation:** Prune or rewrite \~90 articles deemed irrelevant, thin, or low-quality.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Many articles were migrated from old sites without optimization or were duplicates from past email campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Next Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Categorize the audit findings (e.g., "Kill," "Refresh") to simplify Rimkus's review.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Rimkus:** Alishia and Jen will review the categorized list and provide final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Action:** Alishia will then delete approved articles and implement 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)

### SOW Deliverables Review

  - [Vitali Edrenkine reviewed the SOW to confirm all deliverables are on track.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Status Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [**ICPs/Personas:** Complete (audience personas artifact).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
      - [**Editorial Roadmap:** Complete (Airtable content OS).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
      - [**Competitive Brief:** Complete (part of initial topic research).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [**Voice & Style Guide:** Needs alignment. Rimkus's guide (from Jo) will be merged with GrowthX's version.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [**Technical SEO Audit:** Not yet delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
          - [**Timeline:** First draft in 1 week, presentation in 2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)

### Internal Content Review

  - [**Request:** Rimkus asked GrowthX to review internal content (e.g., from the digital forensics team) for SEO/AO best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [**Agreement:** GrowthX will provide free reviews for the first 5 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
      - [**Process:** Aida will review drafts and then hold live coaching calls with the Rimkus team.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
      - [**Why:** To train the Rimkus team on SEO/AO best practices so they can eventually self-review.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
      - [Categorize the blog audit findings for Rimkus's review (due next week).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [Deliver the first draft of the technical SEO audit (due in 1 week).](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1318.0)
      - [Send 5 new blogs for review this week.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
      - [Send the Looker Studio link to Alishia.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [**Rimkus:**](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Review the categorized blog audit list and provide final approval.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [Merge the Rimkus and GrowthX voice & style guides.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1242.0)
      - [Prepare internal content drafts for the initial coaching reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/x6X6AT5zgNFehza7RWju3_V2YsEnN9N_?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
